title: PolyTime
description: Change your time in-game to way, way too many options.
body: # PolyTime ![Dev Workflow Status](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/Polyfrost/PolyTime.svg?style=for-the-badge&color=1452cc&label=release) A simple, no-nonsense time-changer mod, which does exactly that. **Features:** - Manually set time - Use lunar cycles - IRL time - Native OneConfig support ## Screenshots ![PolyTime with OneConfig](https://i.imgur.com/2CXDatS.png) ## Links and support * Did you run into a bug? [Open a bug report](https://polyfrost.org/discord) * Service interruptions? [Checkout Polyfrost Status](https://status.polyfrost.org/) * Feeling social? [Join our discord community](https://polyfrost.org/discord)
